description: Target-root and service discovery provide the normalized indexes and service descriptors that feature detection and context loading consume.
When no feature scores highly enough, the analyze flow hands control to discovery and local-model fallback instead of returning an empty result.
Structured discovery output can be promoted into persistent feature and flow JSON files when confidence is high enough.
Learned intent and feature keyword weights influence future ranking, prompt selection, and context routing.
Generated AI indexes become the persisted source of truth that later runs rediscover and normalize.
